title: IP Risk Score
description: Assess a single IP with lightweight signals from public reputation, RDAP ownership, reverse DNS, and DNSBL checks.

form.ipPlaceholder: Enter a public IPv4 or IPv6, for example 8.8.8.8

errors.empty: Enter an IP address to analyze

history.title: Query history
history.empty: No local history yet. Successful queries will be saved automatically.

insights.title: Key insights
insights.empty: No strong high-risk signal was surfaced.

details.ptrEmpty: No reverse DNS record was observed
details.note: This score uses only public, lightweight signals and should be treated as triage rather than final threat intelligence.
